    "Multidisciplinary personnel teams (MDTs) have been used for the past thirty years to address child abuse.",
    "MDTs have been used to address homelessness.",
    "MDTs are limited in that they can only coordinate efforts within a single county.",
    "Homeless populations often move freely between counties.",
    "Creating a bi-county homeless engagement team would help prevent delays in connecting homeless individuals to housing and supportive services.",
